material_findings: blazor-wasm-appointment-planner is 330645 KB and materially larger than the previously audited planner repository; size alone cannot establish canonical status.
cpdland is a 410703 KB private CPD repository and requires large-file, secret and business-data review before consolidation.
lean-ctx is 427605 KB and requires vendored-content, upstream and license analysis.
ZainAgenda.Next.blazor is a 161285 KB private scheduling repository requiring generated-content and sensitive-configuration review.
CPDEventplanner20230209v1 uses default branch 20230209; branch inventory must not assume main/master.
The CPDEventPlanner, Appointment Planner Web and FileUpload families gained additional candidate members.
